case_number: Miscellaneous Civil Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD M.A No.22 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection No.14 2. For orders on C.M.A No.2954/2024 (Exemption) 3. For orders on C.M.A No.2955/2024 (39 R 1 & 2 CPC) 4. For hearing of main case 07.05.2026 Mr.Hadi Bux Zardari, Advocate for respondent No.8 Mr.Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G Sindh *********** None is present on behalf of the appellant. No intimation is received. The same was the position on the last date of hearing. Continuous non-attendance of the appellant and his counsel demonstrates lack of interest. The matter cannot linger on endlessly. Learned counsel for respondent No.8 submits that the alleged encroachment has also been removed. In these circumstances, the Miscellaneous Civil Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
